title: Applicability of Section 458 of Companies Act, 2013 to LLP
description: Applicability of Section 458 of Companies Act, 2013 to LLP

In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of Section 67 of the Limited Liability Partnership Act, 2008 (6 of 2009), the Central Government hereby directs that the provisions of section 458 of the Companies Act, 2013 (18 of 2013), [except proviso to sub- section (1)] shall apply to a limited liability partnership from the date of publication of this notification in the Official Gazette.
